item.title: Viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae
item.description: Watch how we create the viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae.

media:content.media:title: Viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae
media:content.media:description: Watch how we create the viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae.

item.title: Savory Beef, Gravy and Cheese Pulls
item.description: Loaded with savory beef, deep gravy, and structural cheese pulls.

media:content.media:title: Savory Beef, Gravy and Cheese Pulls
media:content.media:description: Loaded with savory beef, deep gravy, and structural cheese pulls.

item.title: Birria Corn Dogs with Bold Flavor
item.description: A comfort-food mashup with crispy corn dog coating and rich birria-inspired flavor. Recipe in the comments!

media:content.media:title: Birria Corn Dogs with Bold Flavor
media:content.media:description: A comfort-food mashup with crispy corn dog coating and rich birria-inspired flavor. Recipe in the comments!

item.title: Ribeye, Fries and Gravy Pizza Stack
item.description: A hearty pizza stack with ribeye steak, golden fries, and gravy for a rich, layered comfort-food twist.

media:content.media:title: Ribeye, Fries and Gravy Pizza Stack
media:content.media:description: A hearty pizza stack with ribeye steak, golden fries, and gravy for a rich, layered comfort-food twist.

item.title: Cheesesteak Fried Rice Comfort Bowl
item.description: A cheesy cheesesteak fried rice twist that blends bold flavor, hearty texture, and easy comfort in one satisfying skillet meal.

media:content.media:title: Cheesesteak Fried Rice Comfort Bowl
media:content.media:description: A cheesy cheesesteak fried rice twist that blends bold flavor, hearty texture, and easy comfort in one satisfying skillet meal.

item.title: Cheesesteak Fried Rice, Made Comfortably Cheesy
item.description: A flavorful cheesesteak fried rice with savory comfort-food appeal, blending hearty textures and cheesy richness in an approachable, satisfying dish.

media:content.media:title: Cheesesteak Fried Rice, Made Comfortably Cheesy
media:content.media:description: A flavorful cheesesteak fried rice with savory comfort-food appeal, blending hearty textures and cheesy richness in an approachable, satisfying dish.

item.title: Chicken Bacon Ranch Pinwheel Chips
item.description: Crispy, cheesy pinwheel chips with chicken, bacon, and ranch flavor. A simple comfort-food recipe with layered texture and easy prep.

media:content.media:title: Chicken Bacon Ranch Pinwheel Chips
media:content.media:description: Crispy, cheesy pinwheel chips with chicken, bacon, and ranch flavor. A simple comfort-food recipe with layered texture and easy prep.

item.title: Giant Cheez-It Beef Loaded Snack Stack
item.description: Savory beef, cool sour cream, and fresh veggies come together in a giant Cheez-It creation that’s bold, cheesy, and satisfying.

media:content.media:title: Giant Cheez-It Beef Loaded Snack Stack
media:content.media:description: Savory beef, cool sour cream, and fresh veggies come together in a giant Cheez-It creation that’s bold, cheesy, and satisfying.
